notes: Extended cases for queue creation from a linked list and odd-number removal.

cases.name: sample_create_queue_and_remove_odds
expect_contains_all: The resulting queue after removing odd integers is: 2 4

cases.name: all_odd_values_are_removed
expect_contains_all: The resulting queue after removing odd integers is: Empty

cases.name: all_even_values_remain
expect_contains_all: The resulting queue after removing odd integers is: 2 4 6
